blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 1 — Long-Form Pre-Production
blocks.desc:
Vault Vid 1 — pick up where it's paused.
• Lock the rest of the intro + the 14-beat outline
• Draft/refine script beats (narration + interview slots)
• Build the shot list: props, location, who's in frame, shot length per scene
• Note VFX / vault-reveal needs for the first 30–60s

blocks.title: 🚆 Out — Penn Station (sign lease, 11:00 AM)
blocks.desc:
• Head down to Penn Station
• Sign the lease at 11:00 AM
• Back at the desk by 11:15
• Laundromat here if there's time

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 2 — Shorts Batch Brief (Batch 4)
blocks.desc:
Build the Batch 4 brief (plan, not edit).
• List each video's concept + format
• What to film for each: props, setup, physical mechanic
• How each gets edited: structure, graphics, captions

blocks.title: 📌 Daily Post
blocks.desc: LinkedIn post — must be live by 12:00.

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 2 (cont.) — finish Batch 4 Brief
blocks.desc:
Production before any handoff.
• Finish the Batch 4 brief fully
• Answer any open per-video questions
• Push it editor-ready (Notion DB / Google Doc)

blocks.title: 🔒 Deep Work 3 — Continuation
blocks.desc:
Mop up unfinished DW1 + DW2.
• Edit today's short to final
• Finish any Batch 4 spillover
• Back to long-form (script + shot list) if the short is done
• Short break as needed; laundromat if not done earlier

blocks.title: 🔒 Flexible Deep Work — Long-Form
blocks.desc:
Push Vault Vid 1 forward.
• More script / beat detail
• Tighten shot list + logistics (locations, scheduling)
• Set tomorrow's first long-form target
